metadata.description: Professional development skills for Claude Code - Odoo, DevOps, Document Conversion & more

plugins.name: odoo-upgrade
plugins.description: Comprehensive Odoo module upgrade assistant for migrating between Odoo versions (14-19)

plugins.name: odoo-frontend
plugins.description: Comprehensive Odoo website theme development with auto-detection, MCP integration, and Bootstrap version management

plugins.name: codex
plugins.description: Universal development assistant with comprehensive code analysis, generation, refactoring, and optimization tools for all languages and frameworks

plugins.name: devops
plugins.description: Azure DevOps integration for TaqaTechno - manage work items, PRs, pipelines, repos, wiki through natural language via MCP server

plugins.name: ntfy-notifications
plugins.description: Push notifications to your phone via ntfy.sh when Claude completes tasks, needs input, or encounters errors. 100% FREE - No account required!

plugins.name: odoo-report
plugins.description: Professional Odoo Email Templates & QWeb Reports - Complete toolkit for creating, managing, and debugging email templates and PDF reports across Odoo 14-19

plugins.name: pandoc
plugins.description: Universal document conversion powered by Pandoc - Convert between 50+ input and 60+ output formats including PDF, Word, HTML, EPUB, LaTeX, and presentations

plugins.name: remotion
plugins.description: Create professional videos with smooth voice narration using Remotion and Claude Code. Free edge-tts voices, continuous audio pipeline (no voice cutting), full video creation from text prompts.

plugins.name: odoo-test
plugins.description: Comprehensive Odoo testing toolkit - generate test skeletons from model definitions, run tests with formatted output, create realistic mock data, and analyze test coverage gaps across Odoo 14-19

plugins.name: odoo-security
plugins.description: Odoo security audit toolkit - verify ir.model.access.csv completeness, audit @http.route auth= parameters, analyze sudo() usage with context analysis, and generate detailed security reports with risk scoring

plugins.name: odoo-i18n
plugins.description: Odoo internationalization toolkit - extract translatable strings to .pot/.po files, validate translation completeness, find missing translations by language, and manage Arabic/RTL localization with full Odoo 14-19 support

plugins.name: odoo-service
plugins.description: Complete Odoo server lifecycle manager — start, stop, deploy, initialize, and manage Odoo across local venv, Docker, and any IDE (PyCharm, VSCode). Handles server startup/shutdown, environment init, database management, Docker orchestration, and IDE config generation for Odoo 14-19

plugins.name: paper
plugins.description: UI/UX design specialist — design screens, wireframes, and design systems for web, mobile (iOS/Android), and desktop. Includes Figma MCP integration, color theory, typography scales, WCAG accessibility, responsive patterns, and Odoo/Bootstrap theme support
